do: Use variant="secondary" for the outline look — secondary IS the outline variant.
Give every iconOnly button an aria-label (or title) with a text equivalent.
Pass lucide-react icons via leftIcon / rightIcon — never bake icons into children markup.
Use the destructive family (destructive / destructive-secondary / destructive-ghost) for irreversible actions.
dont: Don't use Button for navigation — use link (inline) or link-button (button-shaped navigation).
Don't add hover/focus/active props — those states are CSS pseudo-classes; disabled is the only state prop.
Don't invent variant="outline" or variant="link" — neither exists in this kit.

boundaries: variant is exactly: primary | secondary | tonal | ghost | destructive | destructive-secondary | destructive-ghost.
shadcn mapping: default→primary, outline→secondary; shadcn's link variant is the separate link component.
Sizing comes from --ds-button-size-* tokens + the iconOnly prop — there is no size="icon-*".

whenToUseInstead.when: navigation that should look like a button
